svg.title: JARVIS AI Assistant System Architecture
svg.desc: Full system architecture diagram showing input layer, AI brain, output/action layer, and laptop control modules

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does voice input work in the assistant?')
sendPrompt('How does the camera vision work?')
sendPrompt('What text and file inputs does it support?')
sendPrompt('What system context does it monitor?')
sendPrompt('How does task planning and decomposition work?')
sendPrompt('How does TTS voice output work?')
sendPrompt('How does the memory and context system work?')
g.text: Short-term (conversation) · Long-term (user profile, history) · Vector search

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the voice response work?')
sendPrompt('What files and documents can it create?')
sendPrompt('What apps and programs can it control?')
sendPrompt('What web and API actions can it take?')
sendPrompt('How does computer use / screen control work?')
sendPrompt('How does file system access work?')
sendPrompt('What apps and APIs can it integrate with?')
sendPrompt('What safety and permission controls should be built in?')
g.text: Confirm destructive actions · Sandboxed execution · Human approval for sensitive tasks
